name: @midnight-protocol/test-caller-contract
description: Integration-testing caller contract: the minimal signet caller that pins its MPC response key via initialise, submits a signature request with contract-fixed calldata and verifies the MPC's ECDSA respond-bidirectional response. Testing only, not an integration example.

scripts.compile: COMPACT_PATH=../../node_modules compact compile --skip-zk --feature-zkir-v3 src/test-caller-contract.compact src/managed/test-caller-contract && rm -f src/managed/SignetNotifier && ln -sfn ../../../signet-contract/src/managed src/managed/SignetSigner
scripts.compile:zk: COMPACT_PATH=../../node_modules compact compile --feature-zkir-v3 src/test-caller-contract.compact src/managed/test-caller-contract && rm -f src/managed/SignetNotifier && ln -sfn ../../../signet-contract/src/managed src/managed/SignetSigner
